OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "ContractId": "8007x00000matpYAAQ", "SelectedRecord": { "pncId": "0mw7x0000002EDNAA2", "IsGreen": "No", "Selected": true, "facilityName": "kerSev Hosp", "reviewed": false, "billingOnly": false, "clonedPNCId": "0mw7x0000002EBlAAM", "facilityTitle": "EE Nurse Practitioner", "HpfId": "0bS7x0000004w5REAQ", "SelectedPNCId": "0mw7x0000002EDNAA2", "HPFName": "Laurel Arriza - kerSev Hosp", "facilityTitleId": "0hs7x0000007K8iAAE", "contractEmploymentType": "Employee", "facilityId": "0017x00001a6SamAAE", "IsGrey": "No" } }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianContractGetFacilityDetails

omniProcessElements.name: ReturnFacilityDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "FacilityList" : "=%SelectedDisplayList%", "CpaRecords" : "=%IP_GetRateType%", "ContractStatus" : "=%DRE_GetFacility:contractStatus%", "SelectedRecord" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%SelectedRecord:pncId%),%SelectedRecord%,%SelectedDisplayList|1%)", "ContractStartDate" : "=%DRE_GetFacility:contractStartDate%", "ContractClinicianId" : "=%DRE_GetFacility:ContractClinicianId%", "IsClonedClientContract" : false, "LastSynchedDate" : "=%DRE_GetFacility:LastSynchedDate%", "AdditionalHPFsPresent" : "=ISNOTBLANK(%LA_MeregeClinicianAndContractHPF%)", "IsExecutedContract" : "=ISNOTBLANK(%GetExecutedClinicianContract:ExecutedContract%)", "DisableSubmitContractRequest" : "=IF(%DRE_GetFacility:contractStatus%=='Draft',false,true)", "CurrentTime" : "=NOW()", "ContractRecordType" : "=%DRE_GetFacility:contractRecordType%", "SelectedPNCId" : "=%SelectedRecord:pncId%" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
